story.prologue.title: The first crack
story.prologue.text: You did not enter your mind. You were summoned.
story.chapter.controlador.title: Office of Absolute Control
story.chapter.controlador.intro: Chaos is just an elegant word for incompetence.
legal.disclaimer: Mental Saboteurs: Invisible Inhabitants is an interactive work of psychological fiction. It does not provide diagnosis, treatment or medical advice.
